chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-265 of 2015 ---------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------- Hearing Case 1.For hearing of CMA No.32807/2016. 2.For hearing of Main Case. 29-12-2016 Mr. Muhammad Rehman, Advocate a/w Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Altaf, Special Prosecutor NAB. I.O. Hassan Noor, NAB is present. ------------------------------- The petitioner was granted interim pre-arrest bail on 15.01.2015 by this court subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.500,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this court. He wants to visit Australia for some family commitment, therefore, he has applied to this court for one time permission to travel. The learned counsel further argued that the matter is still at inquiry stage and the petitioner appeared before the I.O. and recorded his statement. Even in pursuance of the order dated 28.12.2016 he again appeared before the I.O. Mr. Hassan Noor who wanted to confront some documents to the petitioner. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB is present with the I.O. Mr. Hassan Noor. He submits that within two months the reference will be filed in the NAB Court. Mr. Hassan Noor further confirms that in pursuance of the order the petitioner has appeared and documents were confronted to 2 him. The learned Special Prosecutor NAB and I.O. both have no objection for one time permission to the petitioner for travelling to Australia subject to furnishing additional surety in the sum of Rs. One Million. The petitioner agrees to furnish additional surety in the sum of Rs.

One Million. The petitioner agrees to furnish additional surety in the sum of Rs. One Million to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Order accordingly. The petitioner will return back to this country within one month and will inform his arrival to the court through statement in writing. The counsel for the petitioner as well as Special Prosecutor NAB have confirmed that the name of the petitioner is not on ECL. Let this petition be fixed in court on 30.01.2017 as suggested by the counsel for the parties. To be fixed according to roster. CMA No. 32807 of 2016 is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Asif
